title: gonystylus decipiens
intro: Gonystylus decipiens, also known as the Borneo ironwood or Bornean gonystylus, is a species of tree in the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonystylus decipiens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Gonystylus decipiens typically involve drying the leaves or bark, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
